texto: Crisis is what suppressed pain looks like
autor: it always comes to the surface. It shakes you into reflection and healing.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a it always comes to the surface. It shakes you into reflection and healing.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Crisis is what suppressed pain looks like” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, bryant-mcgill, crisis pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
